prompt: How can I tell the difference between a rabbit and a cat?
evidence: I received a shipment of prefabricated skinned rabbit last week and the shipment seemed unusual. Rabbits have a very close resemblance to cats once their “hair” and skin have been removed. Is there a telltale sign that I’m working with Bugs Bunny, not Sylvester? I have a suspicion that Elmer Fudd is running out of legitimate product. All jokes aside, how do you tell the difference?
